description: Developed a Hospital Management Information System (SIMRS) from scratch, managing the software development lifecycle (SDLC) and stakeholder requirements.
achievements: Developed the Hospital Management Information System (SIMRS) product from the ground up.
Designed the core system architecture and complex database schema to ensure high scalability, optimal performance, and secure medical data isolation.
Developed crucial modules end-to-end using Laravel and React, with an initial focus on Electronic Medical Record (EMR) management and secure user authentication workflows.
Managed the entire software development life cycle (SDLC) independently, including gathering technical requirements directly from project stakeholders.

description: Maintained multi-platform interfaces and contributed to omnichannel SaaS backend service integrations.
achievements: "Melangkah" App (Web & Mobile): Maintained the frontend system (bug fixing) using Next.js, Vue.js, and Flutter to improve performance stability and user interface responsiveness.

SaaS & Omnichannel Service: Contributed to the development of a SaaS architecture divided into 3 main components, focusing on the Go and MySQL-based Omnichannel service implementation to handle multi-marketplace API integrations, and managing other parts using React, Django, and PostgreSQL.
"Task Master" App: Trusted in the full development phase to design and implement new features end-to-end using Next.js, Django, and PostgreSQL on both Frontend and Backend.

description: Built automated bot workflows, serverless ingestion functions, and structured tracking databases.
achievements: Developed the Domyikado WhatsApp bot and a gamification system based on Strava data scraping to automate user interaction.
Designed a serverless architecture using Google Cloud Functions and Go to process activity data in real-time and efficiently.
Managed data storage and analytics on MongoDB NoSQL database to support analytical features and reward systems on the Domyikado website.

description: Designed backend micro-features and database optimizations for village-oriented SaaS applications.
achievements: Designed and developed the backend architecture for a village service SaaS (Software as a Service) platform spanning Web and Android applications.
Implemented secure authentication using Google OAuth via Google Console to simplify the user login process.
Built internal community and social media features, including custom group chat systems to facilitate communication among subscribed villagers.
Optimized database management using MySQL to ensure efficient storage of village profiles and social activity histories.
